# Category: Images

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:START -->
## What’s in this folder

This folder contains **Aspose.Words** examples related to **Images**. Each example is a standalone `.cs` file.

## Files

- `crop-an-image-within-a-document.cs`
- `extract-images-from-a-document.cs`
- `get-the-actual-bounds-of-a-shape-in-points.cs`
- `insert-a-barcode-image-on-each-document-page.cs`
- `insert-a-floating-image-at-a-specified-position-and-size.cs`
- `insert-an-image-into-a-document-from-a-file-path-using-the-insertimage.cs`
- `insert-an-image-into-a-document-from-a-stream-using-the-insertimage-me.cs`
- `insert-an-inline-image-at-the-cursor-position.cs`
- `insert-an-inline-image-from-a-file-using-a-file-path-string-with-inser.cs`
- `iterate-over-all-shape-nodes-in-a-document-to-locate-images.cs`
- `lock-the-aspect-ratio-of-an-inserted-image-using-the-aspectratiolocked.cs`
- `save-image-data-to-a-png-file.cs`
- `work-with-images-in-a-word-document.cs`

## How to build

From the repo root:

```bash
dotnet restore
dotnet build
```
